title: Check Filesystem Space with df
stdout:
::fixture-ready::
$ df -h
Filesystem      Size  Used Avail Use% Mounted on
/dev/vda1        25G   23G  1.1G  96% /
tmpfs           982M   12M  970M   2% /run
::exit-code::0
$ du -xh --max-depth=1 /var 2>/dev/null | sort -h
24M	/var/tmp
180M	/var/cache
1.4G	/var/log
3.8G	/var/lib
::exit-code::0
